configurations.description: Enables the capture of experimental HTTP client telemetry, including URL template as the span name.
configurations.name: otel.instrumentation.http.client.emit-experimental-telemetry

override.description: Whether this rule overrides an already-applied template.

pattern.description: Regular expression matched against the request URL.

template.description: Template used to derive the low-cardinality route.

configurations.description: Rules for deriving low-cardinality URL templates (routes) from HTTP client request URLs. Only applied when experimental HTTP client telemetry is enabled.
configurations.name: java.common.http.client.url_template_rules

description: This instrumentation enriches HTTP client spans with URL template information for Spring's RestTemplate 6.0+.
name: spring-web-6.0
